title: Junior Investment Banker at Fyers South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Fyers South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Fyers South Asia Partners in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Fyers South Asia Partners:
Fyers South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Fyers South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
